output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?coach ?coachLabel WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P119 wd:Q783270 ; wdt:P168 wd:Q789294 ; wdt:P215 ?opponent ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?opponent wdt:P420 ?coach .
  ?coach rdfs:label ?coachLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?coachLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "1969"))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
